short_term.title: Short-term view (0–30 days · next earnings cycle)
bullets: Run-rate $60.94B in FY2026 Q1, +11.0% YoY — accelerating trajectory entering the next print.
Next-quarter consensus: $61.50B (+0.9% vs current Q) — set by 19 broker contributors.
EPS consensus next qtr: $2.10.
Next earnings: 2026-08-12 — primary catalyst for the short-term window.
short_term.takeaway: Going into the next earnings print, the setup is mixed — execution risk on the next guide is elevated.

long_term.title: Long-term view (90+ days · multi-year setup)
bullets: TTM revenue $245B — in cyclical drawdown.
Sell-side: FY1 $248B → FY2 $262B (+5.6% multi-year top-line implied).
Forward EBIT margin: 27.0% — structural premium business over the long-cycle view.
6-quarter run-rate CAGR: +13.1% — the secular trajectory the market is pricing.
Sector thesis (Health Care): GLP-1 / specialty pipeline and patent cliff dynamics define the 3-year setup.
long_term.takeaway: Long-cycle thesis is intact if the next 2–4 quarters confirm a stabilization in trajectory.

short_term.title: Short-term view (0–45 DTE · front-month tactical)
bullets: Front-month ATM IV: 54.9% — elevated (premium-selling favored).
Put/Call OI: 1.51 — put-heavy hedging (institutions defensive).
30-day implied move: ±6.4% ($187.80 – $213.56) — the 1-σ range the options market is pricing.
ATM skew: -39.87pp — call skew (upside bid — bullish positioning).
Front-month OI cluster: $215.0 — likely magnet / pin-risk for expiry.
short_term.strategy: Calendar spread at $201 strike: short 30 DTE / long 60 DTE. Mid IV, range-bound → harvest near-term theta while keeping back-month optionality.

long_term.title: Long-term view (90+ DTE · LEAPS / structural)
bullets: Back-month avg IV (90+ DTE): 31.3% across 5 expiries.
Available long-dated expiries: 5 dates spanning 119–609 DTE.
210-day implied move: ±23.7% ($153.17 – $248.19) — the long-dated 1-σ range.
Sell-side PT vs options-implied range: consensus $130 (-35.2% upside). Compare to the 90+ DTE implied range above.
Term structure in backwardation (-23.6pp front→back) — near-term event premium; long-dated vol cheaper.
long_term.strategy: Sell 6-month strangle: short $181 put / short $221 call. Range-bound + high IV → premium-selling on both sides; profits if spot stays within ±10%; manage with rolls or assignment.
